  "prompt": "FUT CARD DESIGN, RUNE-ETCHED DRAGONSCALE FRAME IN ANCIENT BRONZE AND SAPPHIRE, ORNATE GOTHIC SHIELD BORDERS ADORNED WITH GLOWING ALIEN RUNES, FEATURING MAJESTIC CHINESE IMPERIAL DRAGON WITH GOLDEN SCALES AND FLOWING MANE, DRAMATIC ATMOSPHERIC STORMY CELESTIAL CLOUDS,  WITH CHERRY BLOSSOMS AND LIGHTNING AND VOLUMETRIC CINEMATIC LIGHTING,  TOP CREST WITH CELESTIAL CLOUD DRAGON, LEFT BADGE SHOWING DRAGON PEARL,  CRITICAL: ISOLATED TRADING CARD ON SOLID BLACK BACKGROUND. #1CIRIwitcher
{
  "theme": "Wiedźmin/The Witcher (dark fantasy)",
  "theme_key": "witcher",
